## Testing

- [ ] `scripts/validate.sh` ran successfully on a clean render
- [ ] No secrets, keys, or `settings.env` data are included in this PR
- [ ] Example configs in `configs/` still match README defaults
- [ ] ShellCheck passes (`pre-commit run shellcheck`)
- [ ] Pre-commit hooks pass (`pre-commit run --all-files`)

## Security Checklist

- [ ] No real IP addresses, port numbers, or network topology committed
- [ ] No files from `secrets/`, `build/`, or `dist/` committed
- [ ] No WireGuard or SSH private/pre-shared keys committed
- [ ] If firewall rules were changed, behavior is documented in `docs/`
